title: Fresh Animations OR (Origin Realms
description: Adds support to Origin Realms for the Fresh Animations pack.
body:
**This is an unnofficial resource pack, not affiliated or approved with Mojang, Minecraft, Mojang AB, Piston Solutions, FreshLX, or anyone else aside from me.**

This pack acts to allows Origin Realms' retextured entities to have Fresh Animations again.

Features:
- Piglin
- Zombie Piglin
- Evoker
- Vindicator
- Illusioner
- Zebra
- Piglin Brute

Based on edited files from Fresh LX's pack. Download here: [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)

How to Use:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This requires a mod that allows you to place resource pack above server resources. One such example is here: [https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker)

Once installed, order the packs like this:

![A view of the order in which packs should be stacked. Fresh Animations OR, then Fresh Animations, and then the OR assets on bottom.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26d606ea2335b88185d05fbfe4f05dfdc9457ecb.png)

</details>
